response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit with 14+ years of full-stack development experience exceeding the 6+ years required. He demonstrates expert-level proficiency in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and is currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly aligned with a required skill. His proven commitment to testing, software craftsmanship, TDD practices, and cloud/DevOps knowledge (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) make him well-suited for the role. Minor gaps include no explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright, but these are tools rather than fundamental skills and should not be barriers for a candidate of his caliber.
strengths: 14+ years of full-stack development with expert-level TypeScript, Node.js, and React; current Staff role at Naver includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, directly matching required skills
Proven testing discipline and software craftsmanship: led TDD workshops, created testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and consistently emphasizes testable architecture across roles
Demonstrated ability to design and lead across the full stack (frontend, backend, infrastructure): AWS CDK, React applications, microservices, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes deployments
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js framework despite job requirement; while Node.js expertise is strong, specific Nest.js knowledge not demonstrated
Vitest and Playwright experience not mentioned; resume shows Jest background and strong testing philosophy, but specific tool familiarity unclear
Very recent role change to Naver (April 2025, approximately 2 months tenure); unclear if candidate is actively seeking new opportunity or recently settled into current position

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow experience
Expert mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
